# Summary

<!-- What changed and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Extension versions were bumped when executable or metadata bytes changed.
- [ ] Specifications, hosts, privacy, rights, and review records are current.
- [ ] `npm run conformance`, `npm run check`, `npm test`, and `npm run bundle` pass.
- [ ] New or changed sources were tested in MangaReader.
- [ ] Commits are DCO signed off.
- [ ] AI-assisted changes were manually reviewed and disclosed in commit trailers.
